items.title: Kings Sign Daeqwon Plowden to Two-Year Deal, and Why It's a Good Move
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Kings Sign Daeqwon Plowden to Two-Year Deal, and Why It's a Good Move Sports Illustrated

items.title: Sources: The Sacramento Kings are signing Daeqwon Plowden to a 2-year, $5.1 million deal. After two-way deals with the Warriors, Hawks, and Kings, Plowden gets a standard NBA deal after averaging 10.8 points last season. Agent Drew Kelso of One Motive Sports will finalize the dea
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Sacramento Kings are signing Daeqwon Plowden to a 2-year, $5.1 million deal. After two-way deals with the Warriors, Hawks, and Kings, Plowden gets a standard NBA deal after averaging 10.8 points last season. Agent Drew Kelso of One Motive Sports will finalize the deal.

items.title: Kings Extend Two-Way Qualifying Offer to Daeqwon Plowden
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Kings Extend Two-Way Qualifying Offer to Daeqwon Plowden Yahoo Sports

items.title: The Sacramento Kings have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Daeqwon Plowden, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Sacramento Kings have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Daeqwon Plowden, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Plowden will now be a restricted free agent this summer.
